2923.reason: This method can throw IndexOutOfBoundsException because it does not check if place+1 is within bounds before accessing tokens.get(place+1). It should be: return place + 1 < tokens.size();

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Directly accessing index place+1 without bounds checking will throw an IndexOutOfBoundsException when the end of the list is reached. It should verify place+1 < tokens.size() instead.]
